name: nummygo
description: NummyGo – food-ordering monorepo (Next.js + Cloudflare Worker + Durable Objects)

scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter customer-web --filter tenant-web --filter api-worker build --parallel
scripts.deploy: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter customer-web --filter tenant-web --filter api-worker deploy --parallel
